About an hour earlier upload than usual? I'm going out today 😛

Posted at 7:11 AM EST

This was a suggestion that I now cannot find 😍

I need to do some of my suggestions more, but since my motivation to write is so random it becomes difficult 😭

Everyone has to stop and go appreciate my bio. Yes, it's minecraft themed, no, I am not done, yes, I did nearly cry making it so far.

And YES, some of those images are clickable 🙏

I believe this to be any pov but lemme know if I'm accidentally catfishing y'all and I'll swap those tags out faster than Satoru can whip out his di-

moving on,

Praise the DAY, minor-aged bots are finally banned from j.ai 😩

No more weirdos in public chats trying to rp harming children!!! Tbh, I don't know why minor bots were allowed when j.ai is pretty clearly a...porn site...like, let's be real about the main reason most people come here 😭

Also I've been considering it and I'm very tempted to make that wlw bot, stay tuned 😏

Updated caption also coming soon btw, I did coding classes in HS so I know a thing or two 😍

I'm tired and am writing this past midnight when I'm supposed to be getting up early tomorrow...

edit: I love losers

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
